description: Pipeline workflow ordering. This file owns stage order, navigation targets, and workflow notes. Component labels, descriptions, paths, and routes are enriched at render time from ui_spec.json and operations.json.

path_legend.critical: Must complete before the pipeline can advance to the next stage.
path_legend.optional: Improves results or observability but the pipeline runs without it.
path_legend.later: Do after the first full pipeline cycle. Reduces review burden and increases confidence in future runs.

steps.label: Add Companies
steps.note: Seed tracked companies before ingest. CIK drives EDGAR coverage; IR configuration drives release discovery.

steps.label: Set Company Runtime Fields
steps.note: Confirm reporting cadence, BTC anchor date, and company-level scrape settings before ingest.

steps.label: Review Metrics & Keywords
steps.note: Metric schema and keyword phrases are the extraction SSOT for prompts, filters, and downstream review surfaces.

steps.label: Verify Prompt Preview
steps.note: Validate the assembled prompt on the live extract surface before the first run or after prompt changes.

steps.label: Tune Metric Rules
steps.note: Threshold tuning is a later-stage refinement after the first extraction cycle produces real data.

steps.label: Adjust Crawl Setup
steps.note: Use only when default crawl prompts or provider settings are not sufficient for a ticker.

steps.label: Ingest EDGAR Filings
steps.note: SEC filings establish broad source coverage and often supply quarter-end context missing from monthly PRs.

steps.label: Ingest IR Press Releases & Archive
steps.note: Monthly production releases and archive pages often contain the freshest monthly production and holdings values.

steps.label: Run LLM-Directed Crawl
steps.note: Use crawl when ticker-specific IR structures or missing archive coverage need targeted discovery.

steps.label: Check Pipeline Observability
steps.note: Use the observability table to confirm document counts, extraction backlog, and configuration health before interpret.

steps.label: Run Extraction
steps.note: This is the primary extraction run across already-ingested documents.

steps.label: Re-extract Gap Months
steps.note: Targeted requeue for missing metrics after the main run; does not scrape new documents.

steps.label: Work the Review Queue
steps.note: Approve or reject queued extraction candidates that need analyst intervention.

steps.label: Inspect Miner Timeline
steps.note: Review company-by-company monthly output in the canonical timeline workflow.

steps.label: Open Document Viewer
steps.note: Use the shared document viewer to inspect source evidence while reviewing or validating a period.

steps.label: Search Data Points
steps.note: Filter extracted values by company, metric, period, and confidence to verify coverage and spot anomalies.

steps.label: Review Results Table
steps.note: Inspect extraction method, confidence, and source snippet for each data point.

steps.label: Inspect Lineage
steps.note: Click a row to load full provenance: report date, source type, URL, and source snippet.

steps.label: Browse Registry
steps.note: Registry is the fastest way to diagnose missing, malformed, or unprocessed source documents.

steps.label: Review Monthly Scorecard
steps.note: The scorecard is the compact output surface for finalized monthly holdings, production, and sales stats.

steps.label: Interrogate Dataset
steps.note: Reserved for future natural-language analysis over the verified dataset.
